---
title: "Agnes Henrietta Anson"
---

## Agnes Henrietta Anson

**Dates:** (b.1851-)

**Maiden name:** (Acland)

### Description

probable member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

Fourth daughter of  of Sir Thomas Dyke Acland, 11th Bt. (1809–1898), she married (1885) Frederick Henry Anson.  She was probably a Gosling as ‘Acorn’;  her diary in Devon Record Office describes a meeting with CMY. [PB 1914]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 9th [1871]
- Letter from Aug 29th [1871?] 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
